name: caverns_spawn_input_traversal
description: Caverns native input traversal from the stock spawn using forward movement. This guards the tight spawn ramp movement envelope without claiming objective progress. [Recalibrated 2026-07-19 for FID-0132: the collision-hull corner fix restores retail door/object footprints; Bond now stops at the closed ramp door's true collision face (hdelta ~119.9) where the pre-fix degenerate half-hull let him clip ~24 units deeper. Thresholds re-derived from the corrected deterministic run with margin; attribution proven via GE007_NO_HULL_CORNER_FIX=1 A/B. See docs/fidelity/ledger/FID-0132.json.]
